  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 43,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet winna Sullainis
fazzija: Ko es dohchu preeksch
timts Wihreim? un winch faz-
zija: Dohd teem Laudim/ ka tee
ehd/ jo ta fakka tas KUNGS:
tee ehdihs/ un wehlpahri paliks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 44,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad likke winch teem
preekcha/ ka tee ehde/ un tur wehl
pahri palikke/ pehz ta KUNGA
Wahrdu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta V. Nodalla.
Elisus schihsta Naëmanu no Spittalibas/ kad
winch septiareisi Jardana masgajas. 1/14.
Sohva Geasu sawas Negaufibas un Mellu
deht/ar Naëmana Spittalibu: 20/27.
N Naëmans ta kehni-
ena no Sihrijas Karra
Leels-Kungs/bija weens
augsts Wihrs preeksch Jawu Kun-
gu/un no leelas Slawas/ jo zaur
winnu bja tas KUNGS tohs
Sihrenus atpestijs/ un winch
bja weenswarrens Wihrs/(bet)
spittalis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un no Sihrijas bija Sit-
rotaji tsgahjnschi/ un weenu ma-
fu Meiteni no Israëta Semnes
aiswedduchi/ kas Naemana
Seewas Kalpone bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta fazzija us Jawu Gas-
paschu: Kaut buhtu mans Kungs
pee ta Praweeta/ kas eeksch Sa-
martjas irr/ winch to gann drihs
buhtn attwabbinajs no winna
Spittalibas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad eegahje winch/ un
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tas Rehn
no Sihrijas: Eij prohjam/ n
eß fuhtischu Grahmatu ue
fraëta Rehnizu. Un tas nog
un rehne pee fewis defmite
lentus Sudraba/ un fesch
sto-chus Sihketus Selta
defmits Swehtku-Drehbes
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winch mesfe to G
matu pee to Israëta kehui
scheem Wahrdeim: Kad
Grahmata pee tew nahk/ ro
es efmu Jawu Kalpu Naë
pee tew fuhtijs/ ka tu win
fawas Spittalibas atswab
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu tas Israëta
niisch fcho Grahmatu bij la-
tad saplohsija winch fa
Drehbes/ un fazzija: Efim
tad par Deewu/ ka es m
nokaut/ un atkat dshiwu po
riht/ ka schis pee man fuhta
nu Wihrn no Jawas Spi-
bas atswabbinaht? xeinmee
wehra/ un raugajt/ ka tas Ge
lus pee man mekle.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet kad Elisus tas D
Wihrs to dsirdeja/ ka tas
ela Kehnisch sawas Drebb
saplohsis/ tad fuhttija win-
to Kehnizu/ un likke fazzih-
pehz effi tu tawas Drebbe-
plohsijs? laid jelle winch-
man nahk/ tad winch at-
weenu Praweetu eeksch If
"
    }
